title: Kryeit: Ultra Enhanced
description: An enhanced version of the Kryeit server modpack with more QoL mods.
body:
This modpack is a more enhanced version of the Kryeit server modpack which [you can find here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kryeit). I have designed this modpack to be compatible with both the main survival server and the creative one.

In this modpack you can find multiple QoL mods that improve playing on the server. These mods include:
- Xaero's Minimap and World Map
- Multiple performance mods such as Sodium.
- Built in shader support for Create, meaning no more heavy lag.
- A much better item panel (EMI and some of its addons).

Please contact me on discord (sirnugget_) or in the Kryeit Survival Server when I am online with MaysonBean.

Thanks!

# CREDITS
- MuriPlz for creating the lovely server, Kryeit. You can find the base modpack [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kryeit)
